## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Megan Rose Dickey's background and potential fit for a role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Megan has extensive experience in journalism and content creation, with a focus on tech industry coverage and San Francisco-specific issues](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [growthx.ai is experiencing rapid growth and evolving its platform beyond AirOps, building its own technology to meet scaling demands](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [The role's specifics are flexible, with potential applications in client-facing content creation, storytelling, and developing growthx.ai's own media presence](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)

## Topics

### Megan's Professional Background

  - [Entire post-college career in content and journalism](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Covered tech industry extensively, recently focused on San Francisco issues](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Held marketing roles:](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
      - [At Kite: Helped connect large companies (e.g., Visa, Kimberly Clark) with startups for innovation](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
      - [At Backstage Capital: Chief Content Officer, managing newsletter, blog, and podcasting](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)

### AI in Journalism

  - [Megan uses AI (e.g., ChatGPT) for idea generation and interview preparation](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Hasn't used AI to write full stories, but leverages it for:](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Brainstorming additional sources/businesses for stories](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
      - [Refining interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Notes the sensitivity around AI use in journalism](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### growthx.ai's Evolution

  - [Started building workflows on AirOps platform](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [Outgrew AirOps due to scaling needs and limitations](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)
  - [Now developing proprietary platform:](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
      - [Abstracts much functionality outside of AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
      - [Offers greater flexibility and processing speed](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Transitioning away from AirOps in the near future](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)

### Potential Role Opportunities

1.  Client-facing content creation within existing pod structure
2.  Developing growthx.ai's own storytelling and media presence
3.  Creating customer stories for clients:
      - [Interviewing clients' customers](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [Synthesizing information](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
      - [Crafting content strategies beyond just SEO](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
4.  Helping clients launch their own media arms/blogs

### Value of Storytelling in Tech

  - [Kyle notes many software companies focus too heavily on tactical website optimization](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Megan's journalism background could provide valuable perspective on resonating with audiences](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Emphasis on human impact and broader context in storytelling](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to communicate next steps to Megan](https://fathom.video/share/U9CkR26v3VNurtPE_8u46LELr5Lq2sdV?tab=summary&timestamp=1970.0)
